seoTitle: Deakin vs Denman Prospect — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Deakin and Denman Prospect. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Deakin vs Denman Prospect: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Deakin and Denman Prospect.
heading: Deakin vs Denman Prospect — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Deakin, Australian Capital Territory and Denman Prospect, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Denman Prospect has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Deakin (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Deakin or Denman Prospect safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Deakin has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Denman Prospect scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Deakin scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Denman Prospect scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Deakin or Denman Prospect?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Denman Prospect has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
